whole_image_findings: Head-and-shoulders portrait is coherent and realistic with natural lighting, catchlights, skin texture, and hair silhouette.
Wardrobe prompt fix is respected: dark blazer and textured collared shirt are visible; no bare shoulders, strapless top, or unclothed torso regression.
Eyes, nose, lips, jawline, and visible ear region are anatomically consistent. Mouth is closed, so teeth cannot be assessed.
Hands, feet, and lower body are outside the crop and are scored not_visible rather than pass.
Background is simple and coherent with no obvious object collisions, text artifacts, or frame-breaking distortions.
Minor note: skin is slightly polished/smooth in the cheek and forehead regions, but not enough to fail this bounded runtime smoke.

known_issues.note: This is one bounded EC2 smoke image. It supports target-runtime proof for the lane but does not replace broader multi-sample image-quality certification.

next_action: Record runtime evidence, update pullback QA completion references, and keep broader lane certification pending until required multi-sample or downstream quality gates are complete.
